arts.ttl: MK Dons boss: Williamson's Carlisle United are in a 'false position'
arts.sum: MK Dons boss Scott Lindsey insists Carlisle United are "probably in a false position” under Mike Williamson.

arts.ttl: Former Carlisle United striker leaves Championship club for Norway
arts.sum: Former Carlisle United striker Elias Sørensen has left the English game after half a season in the Championship with Portsmouth.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United's plans amid the big freeze
arts.sum: Mike Williamson says Carlisle United are doing all they can to prepare for MK Dons despite the disruption of the freezing weather.

arts.ttl: Barrow sign son of ex-Carlisle United boss and move for Blues 'target'
arts.sum: Barrow are set to sign a player who has been linked with Carlisle United - having also brought in the son of a former Blues manager.
